summary: Build a deterministic autonomy stress harness (CLI + receipts) to red-team auto_loop/conductor flows before unattended runs.

steps.title: Capture harness requirements
steps.notes: Documented scenario scope, receipt expectations, and CI hooks from the queue brief + automation docs.

steps.title: Design scenario schema + CLI
steps.notes: Define scenario manifest format, CLI arguments, and output receipts before touching automation modules.

steps.title: Implement harness + CI integration
steps.notes: Implement runner, fixtures, receipts, docs, and add a CI guard to block promotion when stress tests fail.

checkpoint.description: Harness CLI emits receipts for all scenarios and CI enforces guardrail coverage.
